channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SODFC] Crescentis Capital Ltd: No Encumbrance of Shares by Promoter and Promoter Group for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Crescentis Capital Ltd has announced that the promoters and the Promoter Group, along with their persons acting in concert, have not made any encumbrance of shares, directly or indirectly, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made pursuant to Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Crescentis Capital Ltd has no encumbrance of shares by Promoter and Promoter Group for FY 2025-2026
  • Disclosure made pursuant to Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • Promoters, Promoter Group, and their persons acting in concert did not make any encumbrance of shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOM DATT FINANCE CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MACPLASQ] Machino Plastics Launches 'Saksham Niveshak' Campaign to Update KYC Details and Prevent Transfer of Unpaid Dividends to IEPF
item.description:
Machino Plastics Limited has announced the launch of its Second 100-Day Campaign - 'Saksham Niveshak' - starting from 1st April, 2026 to 9th July, 2026. The campaign aims to facilitate direct payment of unpaid/unclaimed dividends to the rightful shareholders by updating their KYC details, bank mandates, and contact information. This initiative is in accordance with the guidelines issued by the Investor's Education and Protection Fund Authority (IEPFA), Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA). Shareholders holding shares in physical form are advised to update their KYC details and nomination details with the Registrar and Share Transfer Agents (RTA) of the Company. Shareholders holding shares in Demat form shall update their KYC and Bank Account details with their respective Depository Participant(s). The Company has also uploaded details of unpaid/unclaimed dividend for the past seven (7) years on its website under the 'Unclaimed Dividend' section.

  • Launch of Second 100-Day Campaign 'Saksham Niveshak' by Machino Plastics Limited
  • Campaign aims to update KYC details, bank mandates, and contact information of shareholders
  • Initiative in accordance with guidelines issued by IEPFA, MCA
  • Shareholders holding shares in physical form should update KYC and nomination details with RTA
  • Shareholders holding shares in Demat form should update KYC and Bank Account details with Depository Participant(s)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MACHINO PLASTICS LTD.-$ | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [SANOFI] Sanofi India Ltd Announces 70th AGM with Key Appointments and Dividend Declaration
item.description:
Sanofi India Ltd has announced its 70th Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for April 29, 2026. The meeting will be conducted through Video Conferencing / Other Audio-Visual Means (VC / OAVM) facility. The AGM will consider and adopt the Annual Audited Financial Statements for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The Company will confirm the payment of interim dividend of ` 75 per equity share and declare a final dividend of ` 48 per equity share for the same financial year. The AGM will also consider the re-appointment of Mr. Vaibhav Karandikar and Mr. Eric Mansion, who retire by rotation. Further, the AGM will appoint Ms. Sudipta Chakraborty as a Director and Whole-time Director for a term of 3 years. The Company will also appoint Mrs. Rajani Kesari as an Independent Director for a term of 5 consecutive years.

  • Sanofi India Ltd announces its 70th AGM for April 29, 2026
  • Consideration and adoption of Annual Audited Financial Statements for FY 2025
  • Confirmation of interim dividend of ` 75 and declaration of final dividend of ` 48 per equity share for FY 2025
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Vaibhav Karandikar and Mr. Eric Mansion as Directors
  • Appointment of Ms. Sudipta Chakraborty as Director and Whole-time Director
  • Appointment of Mrs. Rajani Kesari as an Independent Director for 5 years

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sanofi India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EMCURE] Emcure Pharma Slashes Poviztra Starting Dose Price by 55% to Boost Patient Access
item.description:
Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd. has announced a significant price reduction for its weight management drug, Poviztra® (semaglutide injection). The starting dose price of Poviztra® will now be available at Rs. 3,999/- per month, a 55% decrease. This price revision will make the innovator molecule more accessible to a larger patient base, addressing India's growing obesity epidemic. The innovator semaglutide molecule has been on the market for nearly a decade and is backed by robust clinical and real-world evidence.

  • Poviztra® starting dose price reduced by 55% to Rs. 3,999/- per month
  • Prices of Poviztra® reduced by 47% on average across doses
  • Emcure Pharma aims to expand access and enable more patients to benefit from this proven therapy at the revised price
  • Semaglutide molecule is backed by nearly 50 clinical trials and has been taken by millions of patients worldwide
  • Price reduction aims to address India's growing obesity epidemic

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd | Category: Price Reduction

item.title: [EQUITASBNK] Equitas Small Finance Bank's Deposits and Advances Grow by 21.58% YoY and 6.74% QoQ as of March 31, 2026
item.description:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited has reported its business updates for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026. The bank's gross advances grew by 21.58% YoY and 6.74% QoQ, primarily driven by robust disbursements of Rs. 7,347 Crore. Total deposits increased by 7.96% YoY and 6.56% QoQ. The bank's CD Ratio stands at 93.69%, and the Cost of Funds is at 6.93%. The bank also reported improvements in the 1-90 DPD and X Bucket Collection Efficiency in Microfinance & Micro Loans.

  • Gross Advances grew by 21.58% YoY and 6.74% QoQ
  • Total Deposits increased by 7.96% YoY and 6.56% QoQ
  • CD Ratio stands at 93.69%
  • Cost of Funds is at 6.93%
  • Improvements in the 1-90 DPD and X Bucket Collection Efficiency in Microfinance & Micro Loans

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SAMBHAAV] Sambhaav Media Ltd: Chhayaben Vadodaria Acquires Shares Through Gift, Total Voting Rights Increase to 3.18%
item.description:
Sambhaav Media Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Chhayaben Vadodaria. Chhayaben Vadodaria, a Promoter Group member, has acquired shares and voting rights through gift from her sons - Karan Vadodaria and Siddharth Vadodaria. The total voting rights of Chhayaben Vadodaria have increased to 3.18% post-acquisition.

  • Chhayaben Vadodaria, a Promoter Group member, has acquired shares and voting rights through gift from her sons.
  • The total voting rights of Chhayaben Vadodaria have increased to 3.18% post-acquisition.
  • The acquisition was made through Off Market Mode.
  • The total share capital and voting capital of the TC remains unchanged post-acquisition.
  • The acquisition was made on 27-03-2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAMBHAAV MEDIA LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DCMSRMIND] DCM Shriram Industries Ltd: Urvashi Tilakdhar Acquires 13.83% Shares Through Off-Market Transfers
item.description:
DCM Shriram Industries Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Urvashi Tilakdhar. The disclosure reveals that Urvashi Tilakdhar, along with other acquirers and persons acting in concert (PAC), have acquired a significant number of shares in DCM Shriram Industries Ltd. The total voting capital of the company remains unchanged before and after the acquisition. The mode of acquisition was off-market transfers, and the transaction took place on 30th March 2026.

  • Urvashi Tilakdhar and associates have acquired a 13.83% stake in DCM Shriram Industries Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made through off-market transfers on 30th March 2026.
  • The total voting capital of DCM Shriram Industries Ltd. remains unchanged before and after the acquisition.
  • Other acquirers and persons acting in concert with Urvashi Tilakdhar include Alok Shriram, L. Bansi Dhar & Sons (HUF), Suman Bansi Dhar, Tilak Dhar & Sons (HUF), Akshay Dhar, Aditi Dhar, Alok B. Shriram & Family, Madhav B. Shriram & Family, Foundation/Nominee, and Akshay Foundation.
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of DCM Shriram Industries Ltd. after the acquisition is 86,992,185.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCM SHRIRAM INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PRITIKAUTO] Pritika Auto Industries: Promoters Declare No Encumbrance of Shares in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Pritika Auto Industries Ltd. has received a yearly disclosure from its promoters and Persons acting in concert (PAC) under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure, made for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, states that the promoters, including M/s. Pritika Industries Ltd., Ms. Rishi Mangat, Mr. Gurkaran Singh Nibber, and Ms. Pavit Nibber, held 9,59,07,391 equity shares of Pritika Auto Industries Limited as of March 31, 2026. The promoters have declared that they have not made any encumbrance of shares directly or indirectly during the financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Pritika Auto Industries Ltd. received a yearly disclosure from its promoters and PAC.
  • The disclosure was made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The promoters held 9,59,07,391 equity shares as of March 31, 2026.
  • No encumbrance of shares was made directly or indirectly during the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The disclosure was made for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pritika Auto Industries Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [KCPSUGIND] Promoter Vinod R. Sethi Acquires 0.06% Shares of KCP Sugar & Industries Corporation Ltd
item.description:
Pursuant to Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulation, 2011, KCP Sugar & Industries Corporation Ltd has received a disclosure from Mr. Vinod R. Sethi, a promoter, who has acquired 75,000 equity shares representing 0.06% of the total issued and paid-up share capital of the company. The acquisition was made through the open market.

  • Mr. Vinod R. Sethi, a promoter, acquired 75,000 equity shares
  • The acquisition represents 0.06% of the total issued and paid-up share capital
  • The acquisition was made through the open market
  • The total issued and paid-up share capital of the company is 11,33,85,050 Equity shares of Re 1/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KCP SUGAR & INDUSTRIES CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ORIENTTR] Orient Tradelink Ltd: No Encumbrance on Shares by Promoters in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
In accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Orient Tradelink Ltd's promoters and promoter group, including Aushim Khetarpal, Aarti Khetarpal, and Raadhika Khetarpal, confirmed no encumbrance on their shares in the company for the financial year ended 31st March, 2026. This declaration was made to the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) by the Audit Committee of Orient Tradelink Limited.

  • Orient Tradelink Ltd's promoters and promoter group confirmed no encumbrance on their shares for the financial year ended 31st March, 2026.
  • This declaration was made in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The declaration was submitted to the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) by the Audit Committee of Orient Tradelink Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORIENT TRADELINK LTD. | Category: Monthly Update
